Aberrant Resilience.name: Aberrant Resilience
Aberrant Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, and stunned conditions, and it has advantage on saves against spells or effects that would alter its form.

Acid Breath.name: Acid Breath
Acid Breath.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] exhales acid in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a [[/save]] save, taking [[/damage average]] damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

Aggressive.name: Aggressive
Aggressive.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.

Amorphous.name: Amorphous
Amorphous.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can breathe air and water.

Antimagic Susceptibility.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
Antimagic Susceptibility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] must succeed on a [[/save constitution]] save against the caster’s spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

Armored Vehicle.name: Armored Vehicle
Armored Vehicle.description: Creatures inside the [[lookup @name lowercase]] have three-quarters cover from attacks outside the vehicle.

Beak.name: Beak
Beak.description:
[[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended]].

Melee Weapon Attack: [[/attack]], reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.

Blind Senses.name: Blind Senses
Blind Senses.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can’t use its keensense while deafened and unable to smell.

Blood Sense.name: Blood Sense
Blood Sense.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can pinpoint, by scent, the location of creatures that aren’t Constructs or Undead and that don’t have all of their HP within 60 feet of it and can sense the general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of it.

Brutal.name: Brutal
Brutal.description: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the [[lookup @name lowercase]] hits with it (included in the attack).

Celestial Resilience.name: Celestial Resilience
Celestial Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to radiant damage.

Change Shape.name: Change Shape
Change Shape.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] magically transforms into a Medium or smaller Beast that has a CR no higher than its own or back into its true form, which is a [[lookup @traits.type.config.label]]. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying transforms with it. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

Construct Nature.name: Construct Nature
Construct Nature.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

Construct Resilience.name: Construct Resilience
Construct Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is immune to poison and psychic damage, and it is immune to exhaustion and the charmed, frightened, paralyzed, petrified, and poisoned conditions.

Cunning Action.name: Cunning Action
Cunning Action.description: The spy takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

Dark Devotion.name: Dark Devotion
Dark Devotion.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to the charmed and frightened conditions.

Demonic Resilience.name: Demonic Resilience
Demonic Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

Detect.name: Detect
Detect.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] automatically detects every creature and trap within 30 feet of it, pinpointing the current location of each.

Elemental Nature.name: Elemental Nature
Elemental Nature.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

Elemental Resilience.name: Elemental Resilience
Elemental Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks. In addition, it is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the grappled, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, restrained, and unconscious conditions.

Elemental Roar.name: Elemental Roar
Elemental Roar.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] roars at up to two creatures of its choice within 120 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a [[/save]] save or be vulnerable to fire damage until the end of its next turn. A target resistant to fire damage isn’t resistant to it for the duration. A target immune to fire damage is still immune to it, even if the target fails the save.

False Appearance.name: False Appearance
False Appearance.description: While the [[lookup @name lowercase]] remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal item.

Feint.name: Feint
Feint.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] makes a feint at one creature within 5 feet of it, pretending to go in for an attack in one direction only to change it up at the last moment. The target must succeed on a [[/save]] save or the [[lookup @name lowercase]] has advantage on the next attack roll it makes against the target.

Fey Resilience.name: Fey Resilience
Fey Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to the charmed and unconscious conditions.

Fire Ballista.name: Fire Ballista
Fire Ballista.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: [[/attack]], range [[lookup @labels.range]], one target. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.

Fire Breath.name: Fire Breath
Fire Breath.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a [[/save]] save, taking [[/damage average]] damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

Fire Mangonels.name: Fire Mangonels
Fire Mangonels.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: [[/attack]], range [[lookup @labels.range]] (can’t hit targets within 60 feet), one target. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.

Frightful Presense.name: Frightful Presense
Frightful Presense.description: Every creature of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s choice within 120 ft. of it must succeed on a [[/save]] save or become frightened of the [[lookup @name lowercase]] for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect for itself on a success. If a creature’s save succeeds or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

Fungal Toxicity.name: Fungal Toxicity
Fungal Toxicity.description: A creature that hits the [[lookup @name lowercase]] with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it must succeed on a [[/save]] save or become poisoned for 1 hour. If the poison isn’t neutralized before 1 hour has passed, the creature must succeed on a [[/save]] save, taking [[/damage average]] damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

Giant Attributes.name: Giant Attributes
Giant Attributes.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to the stunned condition, and it is vulnerable to the prone condition.

Grappler.name: Grappler
Grappler.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has advantage on attack rolls against any creature grappled by it.

Heightened Hearing.name: Heightened Hearing
Heightened Hearing.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception + 5]] while perceiving by hearing.

Heightened Hearing and Sight.name: Heightened Hearing and Sight
Heightened Hearing and Sight.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception + 5]] while perceiving by hearing or sight.

Heightened Hearing and Smell.name: Heightened Hearing and Smell
Heightened Hearing and Smell.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception + 5]] while perceiving by hearing or smell.

Heightened Sight.name: Heightened Sight
Heightened Sight.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception + 5]] when perceiving by sight.

Heightened Sight and Smell.name: Heightened Sight and Smell
Heightened Sight and Smell.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception + 5]] when perceiving by sight or smell.

Heightened Smell.name: Heightened Smell
Heightened Smell.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception + 5]] when perceiving by smell.

Illumination.name: Illumination
Illumination.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] sheds bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet.

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] magically turns invisible until it attacks or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the [[lookup @name lowercase]] wears or carries is invisible with it.

Legendary Resistance.name: Legendary Resistance
Legendary Resistance.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] fails a save, it can choose to succeed instead.

Life Drain.name: Life Drain
Life Drain.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended]], and the [[lookup @name lowercase]] regain HP equal to half the necrotic damage dealt. The target must succeed on a [[/save]] save or its HP maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creatures finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its HP maximum to 0.

Lightweight.name: Lightweight
Lightweight.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] is going downstream, add the speed of the current (typically 3 miles per hour) to its speed. The [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s speed is 0 ft. while traveling against any significant current.

Limited Telepathy.name: Limited Telepathy
Limited Telepathy.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120 feet of it that can understand a language. This form of telepathy doesn’t allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

Maneuverable.name: Maneuverable
Maneuverable.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can move up to its speed and make one 90-degree turn.

Monstrosity Resilience.name: Monstrosity Resilience
Monstrosity Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

Mycolid Connection.name: Mycolid Connection
Mycolid Connection.description: The mycolid can pinpoint the location of each friendly mycolid within 120 feet of it. In addition, its telepathy range increases to 120 feet when communicating with other mycolids.

Nimble Escape.name: Nimble Escape
Nimble Escape.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes the Disengage or Hide action.

Ooze Resilience.name: Ooze Resilience
Ooze Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to the grappled and restrained conditions, and it is immune to exhaustion and to the blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, and prone conditions.

Opportunist.name: Opportunist
Opportunist.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has advantage on opportunity attacks.

Pack Tactics.name: Pack Tactics
Pack Tactics.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of its allies is within 5 feet of the target and the ally isn’t incapacitated.

Parry.name: Parry
Parry.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.

Plant Resilience.name: Plant Resilience
Plant Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is resistant to exhaustion and to the paralyzed, petrified, and unconscious conditions.

Pounce.name: Pounce
Pounce.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a Claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a [[/save]] save or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] can make one Claw attack against it as a bonus action.

Ram.name: Ram
Ram.description: Melee Weapon Attack: [[/attack]], reach [[lookup @labels.reach]], one target. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.

Regeneration.name: Regeneration
Regeneration.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] regains [[/healing]] at the start of its turn. If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn’t function at the start of the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s next turn. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] dies only if it starts its turn with 0 HP and doesn’t regenerate.

Relentless.name: Relentless
Relentless.description: If the [[lookup @name lowercase]] takes 10 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 HP, it is reduced to 1 HP instead.

Sacrificial Dagger.name: Sacrificial Dagger
Sacrificial Dagger.description: Melee Weapon Attack: [[/attack]], reach [[lookup @labels.reach]], one target. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage. If the target is paralyzed, prone, stunned, or unconscious, it takes an extra [[/damage 1d4 slashing average]] damage.

Sails.name: Sails
Sails.description: While in initiative, the [[lookup @name lowercase]]’s speed is reduced to 15 ft. when sailing against the wind. While sailing with the wind, its speed becomes [[calc @traits.movement.types.walk+15]] feet.

Siege Weapon Resilience.name: Siege Weapon Resilience
Siege Weapon Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name]] is immune to poison and psychic damage, and the following conditions: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, incapacitated, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, stunned, and unconscious.

Speak with Beasts and Plants.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
Speak with Beasts and Plants.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

Spider Climb.name: Spider Climb
Spider Climb.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

Stench.name: Stench
Stench.description: Each creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]] must succeed on a [[/save]] save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

Sting.name: Sting
Sting.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended]], and the target must make a [[/save constitution 9]] save, taking [[/damage 1d8 poison average]] damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

Sunlight Sensitivity.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
Sunlight Sensitivity.description: While in sunlight, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] has disadvantage on attack rolls, and its Perception is [[calc @attributes.perception - 5]] when perceiving by sight.

Swarm.name: Swarm
Swarm.description: The swarm can occupy another creature’s space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can’t regain HP or gain temporary HP.

Swarm Resilience.name: Swarm Resilience
Swarm Resilience.description: The swarm is resistant to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage, and it is immune to the charmed, frightened, grappled, paralyzed, petrified, prone, restrained, and stunned conditions.

Tentacle.name: Tentacle
Tentacle.description: [[/attack extended]]. [[/damage extended]]. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 13). The [[lookup @name lowercase]] has two tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.

Tentacle Slam.name: Tentacle Slam
Tentacle Slam.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] slams creatures grappled by it into each other or into a solid surface. Each creature must make a [[/save]] save. On a failure, a creature takes [[/damage average]] damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn’t stunned.

Undead Fortitude.name: Undead Fortitude
Undead Fortitude.description: If damage reduces the [[lookup @name lowercase]] to 0 HP, it must make a [[/save constitution]] save with a DC equal to 5 + the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the [[lookup @name lowercase]] drops to 1 HP instead.

Undead Nature.name: Undead Nature
Undead Nature.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] doesn’t require air, food, drink, or sleep.

Undead Resilience.name: Undead Resilience
Undead Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] is immune to poison damage, to exhaustion, and to the poisoned condition.

Vehicle Resilience.name: Vehicle Resilience
Vehicle Resilience.description: The [[lookup @name]] is immune to poison and psychic damage, and the following conditions: blinded, charmed, deafened, exhaustion, frightened, incapacitated, paralyzed, petrified, poisoned, prone, stunned, and unconscious.

Volley.name: Volley
Volley.description: Ranged Weapon Attack: [[/attack]], range [[lookup @labels.range]], one target. Hit: [[/damage average]] damage.

Wing Attack.name: Wing Attack
Wing Attack.description: The [[lookup @name lowercase]] beats its wings. Each creature within 10 feet of the [[lookup @name lowercase]] must succeed on a [[/save]] save or take [[/damage average]] damage and be knocked prone. The [[lookup @name lowercase]] can then fly up to half its flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
